item.title: PSA to all writers on Imgur using MS Word
item.description: I don't care if you're writing the world's greatest novel, My Little Pony/Sonic the Hedgehog crossover fan fiction, or anything else. Your work is YOUR work.

item.title: I have a feeling female gun ownership is about to skyrocket
item.description: In 2020 I had a lot of friend’s of friend’s contact me about getting a gun. On Wednesday I had people start contacting me again, mostly females. If any of you are good people have questions let me know and I’ll make more posts.
item.dc:creator: superscout0233

item.title: I Dump because I Care - November 9th, 2024
item.description: If you're like me and live on the internet, you've probably seen most of these. For everyone else...enjoy.
item.dc:creator: helljack

item.title: Painting myself as a Weeping Angel - MCroft07
item.description: A lot of people seemed to like my weeping angel so I thought I'd post it here too :) Thanks to the people who are super kind and not inappropriate on my posts, it's appreciated. Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror It's from doctor who: blink I use professional body paint covers I paint these by looking in a mirror It takes between 6-10 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: You will know them by their works
item.dc:creator: SalemsPath

item.title: My sweet rat Coffee trying out some tricks in her Pikachu costume!
item.description: Coffee trying on the Pikachu costume - its a lot stiffer than the other costumes she's tried due to the felt I used being a different type, so it felt a bit different to her. But she still did a great job, and in typical Coffee fashion gave it her all! Great job Coffee! . Want help with training your rats tricks? I have a rat training book available here! https://www.etsy.com/listing/1605480026/the-ultimate-guide-to-rat-training
item.dc:creator: ShadowtheRat

item.title: This post is devastating! Goodest boy Bruce was abandoned by his family and tied to a tree near Humane Society of Broward! Please share this video everywhere and let's find Bruce a forever home so he can have a forever family for Thanksgiving!
item.description:
If you know anyone looking for a devoted and loving good boy, please send them to Humane Society of Broward.
https://humanebroward.com/pet/?id=A689499&type=Dog&pg=1&fbclid=PAY2xjawGctypleHRuA2FlbQIxMAABpoOhyHtqp2p2Dbkh_JQB2uP51wORGqr2EHbLyS2LG0gWzExVwW_rj7F36w_aem_o7Xta_N5Uldi6EYGOIV41g
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Given current events
item.description: Folks on the margins needs to be careful about what they say here. Imgur is filled with bad actors who might use information for their benefit, and to your detriment. Protect yourselves.
item.dc:creator: Bohrdumb

item.title: Arcane S2 is finally here! Bringing out my Jinx cosplay!
item.description: Would everything just be better off without me?
item.dc:creator: Konelli

item.title: An open letter to my state's incoming Governor
item.description: To the christofascists out there: I'll die on my feet before I live on my knees.
item.dc:creator: SpoZoTheReReRisen

item.title: My last night with these two
item.description: Foster kittens Freddy (left) and Jason are going to their forever home tomorrow! I am SO happy that they are being adopted together! I remember when I was so worried about Jason not eating and Freddy being so scared of me. But look at them now! They are going to make their new family so happy. I will definitely miss them but I am so excited for their future!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

The best pokemon! Brick flies when they see the Police!
squeak!
owo

item.title: Low contact, no contact and unfriending when you don’t feel safe as a human is 1,000,000% appropriate. It’s called self-preservation boundaries.
item.dc:creator: AshDenver
